description: v0.dev template switch test. Changed response_type from v0_html_block_page to v0_json (208B, JSON error format). Previous issue: 'Thinking' infinite loop because SPA ignored HTML response.

test_messages.expected_behavior: error message should appear instead of infinite thinking state

check_items: Is the block response delivered (etap log blocked=1)?
Does the UI show any error or warning message?
Does the page still show 'Thinking' infinite loop?
